# Understanding the Grammar of Graphics


# Installing and Loading `ggplot2`


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
install.package("ggplot2")
library(ggplot2)
```
:::




# Example 1: Scatter Plot


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
ggplot(data = mpg) +
  geom_point(mapping = aes(x = displ, y = hwy),
             alpha = .33)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](ggplot-basic_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-3-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::
